lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਠਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਖਾਇਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਿਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਕੀਤਾ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: mitthaa kar kai khaaeaa piaare tin tan keetaa rog |
lines.english: He thinks that his food is so sweet, O Beloved, but it makes his body ill.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਪਿਛੈ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜੋ ਸਾਚੀ ਸਰਣਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tinaa pichhai chhutteeai piaare jo saachee saranaae |2|
lines.english: We are saved by following those, O Beloved, who seek the Sanctuary of the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉੜਾ ਹੋਇ ਪਤਿਸਟਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaurraa hoe patisattiaa piaare tis te upajiaa sog |
lines.english: It turns out to be bitter, O Beloved, and it produces only sadness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਗ ਭੁੰਚਾਇ ਭੁਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਉਤਰੈ ਨਹੀ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhog bhunchaae bhulaaeian piaare utarai nahee vijog |
lines.english: The Lord leads him astray in the enjoyment of pleasures, O Beloved, and so his sense of separation does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਲਾਲਚਿ ਅਟਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਹਿ ਮੂਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa laalach attiaa piaare chit na aaveh mool |
lines.english: He is filled with longing for Maya, O Beloved, and so the Lord does not ever come into his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਮੇਲਿ ਉਧਾਰਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਿਨ ਧੁਰੇ ਪਇਆ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo gur mel udhaariaa piaare tin dhure peaa sanjog |3|
lines.english: Those who meet the Guru are saved, O Beloved; this is their pre-ordained destiny. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਤੂ ਵਿਸਰਹਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੇ ਤਨ ਹੋਏ ਧੂੜਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin too visareh paarabraham suaamee se tan hoe dhoorr |
lines.english: Those who forget You, O Supreme Lord Master, their bodies turn to dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਲਾਟ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੇਰਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਉਤਰੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੂਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: bilalaatt kareh bahuteriaa piaare utarai naahee sool |
lines.english: They cry out and scream horribly, O Beloved, but their torment does not end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਮੇਲਿ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਰਹਿਆ ਮੂਲੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jo gur mel savaariaa piaare tin kaa rahiaa mool |4|
lines.english: Those who meet the Guru, and reform themselves, O Beloved, their capital remains intact. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਸੰਗੁ ਨ ਕੀਜਈ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜੇ ਕਾ ਪਾਰਿ ਵਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saakat sang na keejee piaare je kaa paar vasaae |
lines.english: As far as possible, do not associate with the faithless cynics, O Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਹਰਿ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸੋੁ ਮੁਹਿ ਕਾਲੈ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis miliai har visarai piaare so muhi kaalai utth jaae |
lines.english: Meeting with them, the Lord is forgotten, O Beloved, and you rise and depart with a blackened face.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਮੇਲਿ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਿਨਾ ਪੂਰੀ ਪਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jo gur mel savaariaa piaare tinaa pooree paae |5|
lines.english: Those who meet with the Guru, and reform themselves, O Beloved, their affairs are resolved. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਢੋਈ ਨਹ ਮਿਲੈ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh dtoee neh milai piaare daragah milai sajaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh finds no rest or shelter, O Beloved; in the Court of the Lord, they are punished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਜਮ ਸਹਸ ਸਿਆਣਪਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਇਕ ਨ ਚਲੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sanjam sehas siaanapaa piaare ik na chalee naal |
lines.english: One may have thousands of clever tricks and techniques of austere self-discipline, O Beloved, but not even one of them will go with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬੇਮੁਖ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਤੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਿਨ ਕੁਲਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਗਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo bemukh gobind te piaare tin kul laagai gaal |
lines.english: Those who turn their backs on the Lord of the Universe, O Beloved, their families are stained with disgrace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਦੀ ਵਸਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਤੀਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਕੂੜੁ ਨ ਚਲੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: hodee vasat na jaateea piaare koorr na chalee naal |
lines.english: They do not realize that they do have Him , O Beloved; falsehood will not go with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sat santokh giaan dhiaan piaare jis no nadar kare |
lines.english: When the Lord casts His Glance of Grace, O Beloved, one is blessed with Truth, contentment, wisdom and meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਿਲਾਇਓਨੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: satigur jinaa milaaeon piaare saachaa naam samaal |6|
lines.english: Those who meet with the True Guru, O Beloved, dwell upon the True Name. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਿਨ ਲੰਘਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh saagar tin langhiaa piaare bhavajal paar pare |
lines.english: He crosses over the sea of pain, O Beloved, and swims across the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਪੂਰ ਭਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin keeratan gun ravai piaare amrit poor bhare |
lines.english: Night and day, he sings the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, O Beloved, totally filled with Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸੇਈ ਸਦਾ ਖਰੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jis bhaavai tis mel laihi piaare seee sadaa khare |7|
lines.english: One who is pleasing to His Will, He unites with Himself, O Beloved; he is forever true. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਮ੍ਰਥ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਦਇਆਲ ਦੇਉ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਭਗਤਾ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: samrath purakh deaal deo piaare bhagataa tis kaa taan |
lines.english: The all-powerful Divine Lord is compassionate, O Beloved; He is the Support of His devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਢਹਿ ਪਏ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜਿ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis saranaaee dteh pe piaare ji antarajaamee jaan |
lines.english: I seek His Sanctuary, O Beloved; He is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: so prabh kade na veesarai piaare naanak sad kurabaan |8|2|
lines.english: I shall never forget that God, O Beloved; Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤੁ ਪਲਤੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਸਚੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat savaariaa piaare masatak sach neesaan |
lines.english: He has adorned me in this world and the next, O Beloved; He has placed the Emblem of Truth upon my forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 ghar 2 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਠੁ ਪੜਿਓ ਅਰੁ ਬੇਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਓ ਨਿਵਲਿ ਭੁਅੰਗਮ ਸਾਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: paatth parrio ar bed beechaario nival bhuangam saadhe |
lines.english: They read scriptures, and contemplate the Vedas; they practice the inner cleansing techniques of Yoga, and control of the breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਜਨਾ ਸਿਉ ਸੰਗੁ ਨ ਛੁਟਕਿਓ ਅਧਿਕ ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਬਾਧੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: panch janaa siau sang na chhuttakio adhik ahanbudh baadhe |1|
lines.english: But they cannot escape from the company of the five passions; they are increasingly bound to egotism. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਰਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੈ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਦੀਜੈ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਿਬੇਕਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: haar pario suaamee kai duaarai deejai budh bibekaa | rahaau |
lines.english: I have collapsed, exhausted, at the Door of my Lord Master; I pray that He may grant me a discerning intellect. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਆਰੇ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਿਲਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਮੈ ਕੀਏ ਕਰਮ ਅਨੇਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: piaare in bidh milan na jaaee mai kee karam anekaa |
lines.english: O Beloved, this is not the way to meet the Lord; I have performed these rituals so many times.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਨਿ ਭਇਓ ਕਰਪਾਤੀ ਰਹਿਓ ਨਗਨ ਫਿਰਿਓ ਬਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: mon bheo karapaatee rahio nagan firio ban maahee |
lines.english: One may remain silent and use his hands as begging bowls, and wander naked in the forest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਟ ਤੀਰਥ ਸਭ ਧਰਤੀ ਭ੍ਰਮਿਓ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਛੁਟਕੈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tatt teerath sabh dharatee bhramio dubidhaa chhuttakai naahee |2|
lines.english: He may make pilgrimages to river banks and sacred shrines all over the world, but his sense of duality will not leave him. ||2||
